tracks.name: Infrastructure & GCP Setup
tracks.description: Local environment configuration, GCP resource provisioning (GCS, BigQuery), and Docker/Conda scaffolding.

tracks.name: Data Ingestion & QC
tracks.description: Automated collection of ClinVar, gnomAD, and Arab-specific datasets to GCS. Perform initial QC and data-type validation.

tracks.name: Data Harmonization & Normalization
tracks.description: Building GCS-hosted Parquet harmonization pipelines (liftover, normalization, provenance) and canonical variant snapshots.

tracks.name: Master Dataset & Analysis Engine
tracks.description: Building the harmonized master dataset from frozen Parquet artifacts and implementing the ACMG rule-based engine (PM2, BS1, etc.) without managed-query dependencies.

tracks.name: Statistical Evaluation & Results
tracks.description: Performing statistical analysis of classification shifts from frozen artifacts and generating publication-grade figures/tables with low-cost local or GCS-backed tooling.

last_successful_step: T003 steps 2.2 and 2.3 finalized on 2026-03-13: SHGP was frozen as a checksum-verified Arab GRCh38 frequency source, AVDB completed a real GRCh37-to-GRCh38 liftover checkpoint with an explicit success/failure report, and the supervisor UI now classifies every source as adopted, supporting, reference-only, demo-only, or blocked. T003 step 3.1 normalization is next.
